prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海综合类最低位次依次约为17491→15882→13919→15979→18065，整体呈\"降-升-降\"波动，2024年较2023年后移约2060名，2025年较2024年继续后 移约2086名，近两年累计后移约4146名，2025年基准约18065名；该校在上海综合类招生计划2021–2025年均为7人，2026年仍为7人，计划连续六年持 平，无扩招或缩招带来的竞争缓冲。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名近年约第134–162名，2026年排名第134名，属全国中上游水平；2022年声誉中性/混合（投档线逐年下降信号），2023年偏正面（食堂服务好、宿舍有自习室）；2026年声誉文件中无直接负面记录；抖音总热度排名第86（一般）， 近年热度平稳，未见明显爆款传播。历史投档异常信号为2022年中关注（投档线从2018年起逐年下降）；第五轮学科评估：畜牧学A、作物学A-，均为农林类优 势学科；招生专业中动物医学对应兽医学大类（A-），食品质量与安全对应食品科学与工程，茶学对应茶学/农学相关方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 动物医学属兽医学大类，近 年社会热度偏热推荐；食品质量与安全属食品科学与工程大类，社会热度一般；茶学属农学方向，整体热度偏低。本省2026年高考报名总人数约66700人（较2025年49276人增长约 35.4%），考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年持续后移的趋势、2026年招生计划持平无缓冲、本省 考生数大幅增长约35.4%导致竞争加剧，以及学校声誉中性偏正面、抖音热度一般等因素，在2025年基准18065名基础上预计竞争略有加剧，位次小幅前移；预测最低位次约17865 名，区间17365–18365名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Shanghai Comprehensive category were approximately 17491 → 15882 → 13919 → 15979 → 18065, showing a "down-up-down" fluctuation. In 2024, it shifted back by about 2060 places compared to 2023, and in 2025, it continued to shift back by about 2086 places compared to 2024, with a cumulative shift of about 4146 places over the past two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 18065. The enrollment plan for Shanghai Comprehensive category was 7 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and remains 7 students in 2026, with the plan unchanged for six consecutive years, providing no buffer from expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking in recent years is approximately 134–162, ranking 134th in 2026, which is at the upper-middle level nationwide. In 2022, reputation was neutral/mixed (signal of declining admission scores year by year), in 2023, it was slightly positive (good cafeteria service, study rooms in dormitories). In 2026, no direct negative records in reputation documents. Douyin total popularity ranking is 86th (average), with stable popularity in recent years and no obvious viral spread. Historical abnormal admission signals were noted in 2022 (admission scores declining year by year since 2018). Fifth round of discipline evaluation: Animal Science A, Crop Science A-, both are advantageous disciplines in agriculture and forestry. Among the enrollment majors, Animal Medicine corresponds to the Veterinary Medicine category (A-), Food Quality and Safety corresponds to Food Science and Engineering, and Tea Science corresponds to Tea Science/Agriculture-related directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Animal Medicine belongs to the Veterinary Medicine category, which has been relatively popular and recommended in recent years. Food Quality and Safety belongs to the Food Science and Engineering category, with average social popularity. Tea Science belongs to the Agriculture direction, with overall low popularity. The total number of college entrance exam registrants in this province in 2026 is approximately 66,700 (an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025), with a significant increase in the number of candidates, leading to intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of declining rankings over the past two years, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026 providing no buffer, the significant increase of about 35.4% in the number of candidates in this province leading to intensified competition, and the neutral to slightly positive school reputation with average Douyin popularity, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 18065, with rankings moving slightly forward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 17865, with a range of 17365–18365.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Tea Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 17365–18365, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Food Quality and Safety as the main choice, with Tier 1 Animal Medicine as a reach (historical min_rank approximately 14281–16940), and Tier 3 Tea Science as a safety option (historical min_rank approximately 15485–18065). Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 17365) can focus on reaching for the flagship major of Animal Medicine.
